message:
feat(bench): add phase timing report to persistent benchmark

Print detailed phase timing breakdown after each FrankenSQLite run:
- prepare_us: time building batch
- consolidator_lock_wait_us: time acquiring consolidator lock
- flushing_wait_us: time waiting while another flusher is active
- flusher path: arrival_wait, inner_lock, exclusive_lock, wal_append, wal_sync
- waiter path: epoch_wait

Key finding: flushing_wait is 1-2.7ms average while actual WAL I/O is only
150µs - this 10-20x overhead is the primary bottleneck at 16 threads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
